species.citation: Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1778 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 7 (1968) 391; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 305.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. PALAWAN.
species.notes: Forests, on brown, clayey loam soil. 0-500(-2000)m.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 9c (1915) 354; Type: Wenzel 737, Leyte: Buenavista, near Jaro, 25-May-1914, 500m.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LEYTE.

species.citation: (Lindl.) Benth. & Hook.f. , Gen. Pl. (Bentham & Hooker f.) 3 (1880) 409 ; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 315; ≡ Castanea inermis Lindl. , Pl. Asiat. Rar. 2 (1830) 6. = Castanopsis sumatrana (Miq.) A.DC. , J. Bot. 1 (1863) 182 ; Soejarto et al., Prelim. Checklist Fl. Pl. Palawan (1995); ≡ Callaeocarpus sumatrana Miq. , Pl. Jungh. (1851) 14.
species.distribution: Java, Malaysia, Myanmar, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand. PALAWAN.
species.notes: Known from Puerto Princesa, Irawan River Valley (Soejarto et al. 6412, A, F, PNH). 0-600m.

species.citation: King , Ann. Roy. Bot. Gard. (Calcutta) 2 (1889) 96 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 7 (1968) 396; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 314.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Agusan del Sur, Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, Zamboanga del Norte.
species.notes: Primary, rarely secondary forests or disturbed hilly country. 0-500m.

species.citation: (Blanco) S.Vidal , Revis. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 265 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 25, as ‘philippensis’; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 7 (1968) 399; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 316; ≡ Fagus philipensis Blanco , Fl. Filip., 2nd Ed. (1845) 503. ≠ Castanopsis javanica auct. non (Blume) A.DC. ; sensu S.Vidal. ≠ Castanopsis inermis auct. non (Lindl.) Benth. & Hook.f. ; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 24.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BASILAN, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Bulacan, Camarines, Nueva Ecija (photos), Rizal, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN, SAMAR.
species.notes: Forests. 400-1800m.

species.citation: Soepadmo , Reinwardtia 7 (1968) 401 ; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 315.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. ?LUZON: ?Laguna (photos), MINDANAO (photos), ?PALAWAN.
species.notes: Wally Suarez (22-Dec-23): Ebalo 408 was cited as being from Palawan (Soepadmo 1972), but this specimen was collected in Banguey (Sabah). Forest. 0-1000m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 10 August 2024

species.citation: (Elmer) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 123 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 217; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 354; ≡ Quercus apoensis Elmer , LPB 3 (1910) 946 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 25.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CATANDUANES, LUZON: Aurora, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, PANAY, SAMAR.
species.notes: Forests. Fl. Mar-Dec; fr. Apr-Sep. (?-)1000-1700m.

species.citation: (Merr.) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 10 (1929) 132; ≡ Quercus boholensis Merr. , PJS 29 (1926) 476; Type: Ramos 43350 (BM, K, US, A), Bohol: Bilar, 600m, Oct-1923.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BOHOL.
species.notes: Note by P.B. Pelser (9-Jan-20): Widely considered to be a synonym of Lithocarpus coopertus (Blanco) Rehder, but J.V. LaFrankie (pers. comm., 3-Jun16) suggests to consider it distinct for now, because it is different from L. coopertus in having an acorn that only covers half the seed. 600m.

species.citation: Hatus. ex Soepadmo , Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 223 ; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 356.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. PALAWAN.
species.notes: Known from Soejarto 6432 (L) 6-Apr-1989, Palawan Ridge between Mt Viadung and Mt Beufort on chromite rich soil. 800-4000m.

species.citation: (S.Vidal) A.Camus , Bull. Soc. Bot. France 92 (1945) 84 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 226; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 377; ≡ Quercus castellarnauana S.Vidal , Revis. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 264, as 'castellarnauiana' ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 26; Type: Vidal 1806 (MA), Marinduque: Santa Cruz, Puso-puso. = Quercus merrittii Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 325 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 28. = Quercus obliquinervia Merr. , PJS 4c (1909) 250 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 29. = Quercus cagayanensis Merr. , PJS 13c (1918) 6 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 26.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Bataan, Benguet, Cagayan, Ilocos Sur, Isabela, Laguna, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Zambales, MARINDUQUE, MINDORO, SAMAR.
species.notes: Forests. Fl. Aug-Jul; fr. Sep-May. (60-)200-2200m.

species.citation: (Merr.) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 123 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 226; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 350; ≡ Quercus caudatifolia Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 324 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 26. = Quercus minahassae Koord. ex Merr. , LPB 3 (1910) 941 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 28. = Quercus bulusanensis Elmer , LPB 10 (1939) 3736, nom. inval., no Latin descr.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. BOHOL, LUZON: Abra, Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Agusan del Sur, Bukidnon, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis, Misamis Occidental, Surigao, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Primary and secondary forests, on ridges, along rivers. Fl. Sep-Jun; fr. May-Jan. 0-1350m.

species.citation: (Miq.) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 123 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 227; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 374; ≡ Quercus celebica Miq. , Ann. Mus. Bot. Lugduno-Batavi 1 (1863) 110 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 26. = Quercus llanosii A.DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 16(2.1) (1864) 97 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 28. = Quercus lipacon Elmer , LPB 6 (1913) 1983 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 27. = Quercus mabesae Merr. , PJS 13c (1918) 7 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 28.
species.distribution: Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. LEYTE, LUZON: Aurora, Bataan, Bulacan, Cagayan, Ifugao, Laguna, NCR, Quezon, Rizal, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Davao, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Norte, Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, POLILLO.
species.notes: Forests, on clayey soil. Fl. Sep-May; fr. Jun-Apr. 20-800(1200)m.

species.citation: (Blanco) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 124, as 'cooperta' ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 231; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 335; ≡ Quercus cooperta Blanco , Fl. Filip., 2nd Ed. (1845) 503 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 26; Type: Elmer 14012 (L, NY, US, isoneo), Mindanao: Agusan del Norte, Mt Urdaneta, Oct-1912. = Quercus reflexa King , Fl. Brit. India 5 (1888) 616 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 30. ≠ Quercus pruinosa auct. non Blume ; Elmer, LPB 3 (1910) 940; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 30.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines. BASILAN, BILIRAN, BOHOL, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Apayao, Aurora, Bulacan, Camarines, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, MINDANAO: Agusan, Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, Lanao, Lanao del Sur, Surigao, Zamboanga, NEGROS, SAMAR.
species.notes: Forests, common in Mindanao, rare and scattered in Luzon, Leyte, Samar. Fl. Feb-Oct; fr. Nov-May. 0-1800m.

species.citation: (Blume) Soepadmo , Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 243 ; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 354; ≡ Quercus glutinosa Blume , Mus. Bot. 1 (1851) 304. = Quercus zschokkei Elmer , LPB 3 (1910) 944 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 31. = Quercus copelandii Elmer , LPB 6 (1913) 1984 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 27.
species.distribution: Philippines, Sulawesi. MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Davao, Davao del Sur, Zamboanga.
species.notes: Forests. (0-)75-900m.

species.citation: (Korth.) Soepadmo , Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 243 ; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 362; ≡ Quercus gracilis Korth. , Verh. Nat. Gesch. Ned. Bezitt., Bot. (1844) 207. = Quercus cyrtorhyncha Miq. , Fl. Ned. Ind., Eerste Bijv. (1861) 350 ; Elmer, LPB 3 (1910) 939; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 27.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Singapore, Sumatra. MINDANAO: Davao, Davao del Sur.

species.citation: (Laguna) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 127 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 250; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 382; ≡ Quercus jordanae Laguna , Un. Nuev. Roble (1875) 7 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 27. = Quercus caraballoana Fern.-Vill. , Fl. Filip., 3rd Ed. 4(Nov. App.) (1880) 209.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Abra, Benguet, Ifugao, Kalinga, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Quirino.
species.notes: Mossy forests on the higher mountains, rather common. Fl. Jan, Jul; fr. Aug-Apr. 1200-2400m.

species.citation: (Merr.) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 133 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 256; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 381; ≡ Quercus luzoniensis Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 323 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 28.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Batangas, Benguet, Ifugao, Ilocos Sur, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Zambales.
species.notes: Mossy forests, rather common in the Cordillera Highlands of N Luzon. Fl. Jan-Jun; fr. Jul-Mar. 1500-2700m.

species.citation: (Elmer) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 128 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 261; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 355; ≡ Quercus mindanaensis Elmer , LPB 3 (1910) 942 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 28. ≠ Quercus dasystachya auct. non Miq. ; Elmer, LPB 3 (1910) 938, as 'lasystachya'; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 27.

species.notes: Common in Mindanao, scattered in Leyte. Forests. Fl. Oct-Mar; fr. May-Sep. 20-600(-1000)m.

species.citation: (Seemen) A.Camus , Bull. Soc. Bot. France 92 (1945) 255 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 262; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 379; ≡ Quercus nieuwenhuisii Seemen , Bull. Dépt. Agric. Indes Néerl. 1 (1906) 6. = Quercus clementis Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 321 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 26.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. BASILAN, MINDANAO: Agusan, Agusan del Norte, Lanao del Sur, PALAWAN.
species.notes: Forests at low and medium elevation. Rare. Fl. & fl. throughout the year.

species.citation: (Blanco) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 129 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 264; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 361; ≡ Quercus ovalis Blanco , Fl. Filip., 2nd Ed. (1845) 502 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 29.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Bataan, Batangas, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines, Ilocos Norte, Laguna, Pampanga, Rizal, Zambales, PALAUI.
species.notes: Low elevation forests. Fl. Nov-Apr; fr. Jun-Aug.

species.citation: (A.DC.) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 129 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 267; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 353; ≡ Quercus philippinensis A.DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 16(2.1) (1864) 97 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 29. = Quercus wenzelii Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 267 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 31. = Quercus rizalensis Merr. , PJS 13c (1918) 272 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 30.

species.notes: Forests on the higher mountains. Fl. Dec-Jul; fr. Oct-Nov. 500-2000m.

species.citation: Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 130. = Lithocarpus buddii (Merr.) A.Camus , Bull. Soc. Bot. France 92 (1945) 85 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 222; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 383; ≡ Quercus buddii Merr. , PJS 35 (1928) 6; ≡ Quercus robinsonii Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 297, nom. illeg., non Ridl. ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 30.

species.notes: Forests, common on Mt Makiling, rare in Samar and Leyte. Fl. Oct-Jun; fr. Jun-Dec. 200-1000m.

species.citation: (Blume) A.Camus , Riviera Sci. 18 (1931) 41, as 'rotundata' ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 275; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 331; ≡ Quercus rotundata Blume , Verh. Batav. (1886) 261 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 30; Type: Vidal 1807 (MA, syn), Luzon: Morong, Antipolo. = Lithocarpus bicoloratus (Elmer) A.Camus , Riviera Sci. 18 (1931) 39; ≡ Quercus bicolorata Elmer , LPB 6 (1913) 1985 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 26. ≠ Lithocarpus bennettii auct. non (Miq.) species.notes: Forests. Fl. Aug-May; fr. Apr-Oct. 400m (photos) to 700-1200m.

species.citation: (Elmer) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 131 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 280; Soepadmo, Fl. species.notes: Forests. Fl. Sep-May; fr. Jun-Dec. 1000-1700m.

species.citation: (Fern.-Vill.) Rehder , J. Arnold Arbor. 1 (1919) 134 ; Soepadmo, Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 285; Soepadmo, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1972) 358; ≡ Quercus vidalii Fern.-Vill. , Fl. Filip., 3rd Ed. 4(Nov. App.) (1880) 209 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 31.

species.citation: Soepadmo , Reinwardtia 8 (1970) 264.
species.notes: Philippine records fide Elmer, LPB 3 (1910) 942, are not confirmed. Elmer had specimens of Lithocarpus submonticola. According to the World Checklist of Selected Plant Families (3-Nov-2017), Lithocarpus oreophilus Soepadmo is a synonym of Lithocarpus monticola (Koidz.) Rehder and endemic to Sumatra.
